MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-14-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ADAM BRUMAGE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO 3/28/22 SINCE THERE'S ANOTHER CASE WITH THE SAME PARTIES INVOLVED THAT HAS A TRIAL DATE OF 3/28/22. PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE JOINT STIPULATION. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO 3/28/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AND PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE AND NOTIFY DEFENDANT ABOUT THE PRE-TRIAL ORDER. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE VIA E-FILING FOR PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL TODAY. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
